summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HH Jaba Admin Hub iteration 5 features. Backend API testing achieved 88% success rate (15/17 tests passed, 2 skipped due to daily limits). Frontend UI testing confirmed all requested features are working correctly.

backend: POST /api/orders creates order with status='pending' (verified via curl - credit order created with pending status)
POST /api/payments/submit-pop accepts text-based POP (transaction_code, amount_paid, payment_method, payment_type)
POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/verify with status=approved updates invoice and credit balance
POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/verify with status=rejected notifies user with reason
POST /api/admin/backlog-credit creates backlog invoice with UUID-based ID and deducts credit
POST /api/admin/defaulter-warning/{user_id}?template=overdue sends notification and returns WhatsApp link
frontend: AdminDashboard has exactly 7 tabs (Pending, Stock, Reconcile, Defaulters, Payments, Invoices, Feedback)
Payments tab shows pending POP submissions with Approve/Reject buttons
Payments tab displays transaction code, amount paid, payment method, payment type
Defaulters tab has warning buttons (Overdue Notice, Limit Reached, Suspended) per defaulter
Defaulters tab has 'Backlog Entry' button that opens dialog
CreditInvoiceModule WhatsApp share uses wa.me/{phone}?text= format
UserInvoices page shows 'Pay' button per unpaid invoice
UserInvoices POP dialog has transaction code, amount, payment method, payment type, and notes fields
Payment Reject dialog has mandatory reason field with placeholder text
Daily order limit is 10 on frontend (DAILY_LIMIT = 10)

skipped_tests: test_credit_order_creates_with_pending_status - User reached daily/credit limits (verified manually via curl)
test_mpesa_order_creates_with_pending_status - User reached daily limits (verified manually via curl)
seed_data_creation: Created admin session 'test-admin-session-c8a2d280' for admin-user-1774273147 (mavin@5dm.africa). Created user session 'test-user-session-07c87002' for user_5463750c8ece (Joe Goga). Reset user credit balance to 25000 for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features are fully functional: (1) Orders default to 'pending' status regardless of payment method (credit or mpesa), (2) POP system is text-based with transaction_code, amount_paid, payment_method, payment_type fields, (3) Admin can approve/reject payments with mandatory reason for rejection, (4) Backlog credit creates invoice and deducts from user credit balance, (5) Three defaulter warning templates (overdue, limit_reached, suspended) send in-app notification AND return WhatsApp link, (6) Dashboard stats include pending_pop_count and total_approved_payments, (7) AdminDashboard has 7 tabs (Manual Invoices removed), (8) WhatsApp URLs use wa.me format, (9) Daily order limit is 10 on frontend. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_features.py.
